versions.version_description: Capo on 3rd, utilizes easier chords for beginners.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Arthurs Theme Best That You Can Do

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]  (x2) 
 
[Verse 1]
[tab]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch] 
It is the night. My body's weak [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch] 
I'm on the run. No time for sleep [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cm7[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch] 
I've got to ride, Ride like the wind to be free again [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]                 [ch]Gm9[/ch] 
And I got such a long way to go [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]                  [ch]Gm9[/ch]   
To make it to the border of Mexico. [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]    
So I'll ride...like the wind [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Ride like the wind.       [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]      
I was born the son of a lawless man. [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Always spoke my mind with a gun in my hand. [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Lived nine lives gunned down ten. [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Gonna ride like the wind. [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]                 [ch]Gm9[/ch] 
And I got such a long way to go [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]                    [ch]Gm9[/ch]   
To make it to the border of Mexico. [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]    
So I'll ride...like the wind [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Ride like the wind.                          [/tab]
Gonna ride like the wind.       

[Break](x2)
[ch]Cm9[/ch]   [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]      
[ch]Cm9[/ch]   [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]    
[ch]Cm9[/ch]   [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]    
[ch]Cm9[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch] 
 
[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Accused and tried and told to hang [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]  
I was no where in sight when the church bells rang. [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Never was the kind to do as I was told. [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Gonna ride like the wind before I get old. [/tab]
 
[Verse 3]
[tab]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch] 
It is the night. My body's weak [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cm7[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Abmaj9[/ch]                     [ch]Gm9[/ch]   
To make it to the border of Mexico. [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]    
So I'll ride...like the wind [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch] 
Ride like the wind.                         [/tab]
